title: Michelle W Bowman: Capital rules for the real economy
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Cato Institute Policy Forum "Basel III and bank capital rules", Washington DC, 12 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260316e.htm

title: John C Williams: Two sides of a coin
body:
Remarks by Mr John C Williams, President and Chief Executive Officer of the Federal Reserve Bank of New York, at the America's Credit Unions Governmental Affairs Conference 2026, Washington DC, 3 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260310f.htm

title: Michelle W Bowman: Liquidity resiliency, financial stability, and the role of the Federal Reserve
body:
Speech by Ms Michelle W Bowman, Vice Chair for Supervision of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, at the Roundtable on Liquidity and Lender of Last Resort, sponsored by the Committee on Capital Markets Regulation, Washington DC, 3 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260310d.htm
